sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71303" key="numfotomi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νυμφο-τομία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n71303.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">removal of the clitoris,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:115" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.115</biblScope> </bibl> tit., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:70t" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.70t</biblScope> </bibl>it.</sense> </entryFree>
